text: Uôi hay lắm =)) cứ như tại sản quốc gia vậy
gloss: Oh that's amazing =)) like it's a national asset
rationale: Surface praise contradicted by =)) marker and hyperbolic comparison; sarcasm flips polarity to negative.

text: đỉnh chop, kì này vibe cực mạnh, GG anh em
gloss: peak quality, this round's vibe is super strong, GG bros
rationale: Slang (đỉnh chop) and English token GG together; positive surface aligns with positive label, code-switch flag set.
